# Try the main page and look for screenshot links
SSH_AUTH_SOCK= ssh -i ~/.ssh/atom -o IdentitiesOnly=yes -o ConnectTimeout=10 root@72.60.80.232 "curl -s -L --max-time 30 'https://web.archive.org/web/20070615220446/http://www.everestpoker.com/'" 2>&1 | grep -i "screenshot\|img\|table\|game\|client\|poker.jpg\|poker.png\|gallery" | head -30
